Author: were491.
Content:
Just saw that [this page](https://mithro-gf180mcu-pdk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/physical_verification/design_manual/drm_15.html) of the PDK mentions a p-well resistor alongside the n-well resistor. I couldn't find the schematic symbol or model by grepping inside the tech, so I'm curious if there actually is one.

-- Not actually planning on using them, I'm just curious.

Author: mole99
Content:
Unfortunately, I don't think it is part of the PDK.

The resistors page does not list it: https://gf180mcu-pdk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/analog/model_parameters/LV/LV_1_4_4.html

Looking at the spice models in the PDK (`sm141064.spice`), I can see that they only include the ones shown on the resistors page.

Magic, however, does extract resistance for pwell/isosub during pex.
